title: Realms of Adventure
description: Realms of Adventure is a Minecraft Modpack that is supposed to make Minecraft feel more like an RPG
body:
# Welcome to Realms of Adventure!

Experience Minecraft in an RPG style with the Realms of Adventure modpack. Here's what awaits you:

## Features:

- **Complex Skill Tree:**
  Delve into an intricate skill tree system, shaping your character's destiny with unique abilities.

- **Quests (Coming Soon!):**
  Embark on epic journeys, uncover hidden lore, and complete tasks for valuable rewards.

- **Character Customizer:**
  Personalize your character with a variety of outfits, accessories, and hairstyles.

- **Reworked Villagers:**
  Interact with revamped villagers, each with distinct personalities and stories.

- **New World Generation:**
  Explore transformed landscapes inspired by Skyrim, featuring towering mountains and dense forests.

- **Custom Items/Recipes (Coming Soon!):**
  Craft powerful artifacts and items using bespoke recipes tailored for the Realms of Adventure experience.

If you have any ideas for the modpack or would like to help development please feel free to reach out on discord at `WatermelonFroggy`

## Sponsored By Bisect Hosting

Share Realms of Adventure with friends and family by hosting your game server on BisectHosting. Their extensive server network spans 20 locations worldwide, and their decade-long experience ensures a seamless gaming adventure. Take advantage of their automated modpack installation and update system, and benefit from their outstanding 24/7 support for any game-related inquiries. Don't forget to use promo code WatermelonFrogy to save 25% on your first month as a new customer!
